name: Ubuntu with Node
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p tmppw-test && npm install -D playwright@1.59.1 --prefix tmppw-test && cd tmppw-test && npx playwright install chromium && cd .. && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2t64 libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0
